package rulecoverage

func NegativeRegexpCompileInHotPath() string {
    ruleID := "regexp_compile_in_hot_path"
    family := "hot_path"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "regexp.Compile or regexp.MustCompile observed inside obvious iterative paths."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
